title: Oil rally extends after shipping disruption threatens prompt crude supply
description: Crude prices climbed as traders priced in tighter near-term availability after a regional shipping disruption, improving the earnings backdrop for upstream and integrated energy producers.
snippet: Strategists said higher oil prices would likely help large energy companies while raising costs for fuel-sensitive industries.

title: Enterprise AI budgets rise as large companies accelerate cloud and automation spending
description: Chief information officers are increasing budget allocations for AI assistants, cloud infrastructure and data platforms as pilot projects convert into broader deployments.
snippet: The spending shift is expected to benefit software and cloud providers with strong enterprise AI offerings over the next several quarters.

title: Bank stocks gain as yield backdrop steadies and credit trends remain resilient
description: Large U.S. banks outperformed after investors grew more comfortable with the rate outlook and stable credit trends, supporting sentiment toward diversified lenders.
snippet: Analysts said a steadier yield environment and resilient fee income could support the group near term.
